### Conclusion

- all three upgrades were executed on Arbitrum mainnet
- raw storage diff across tracked slots is exactly zero: `diff_count=0`
- append-only slots remained zero after upgrade: `factory[20] = 0`, `pool[35] = 0`
- core persistent state stayed unchanged:
  - `portalCount = 1`
  - `allPortals(0)` unchanged
  - `operatorPortalCount(operator)` unchanged
  - `getActiveStake()` unchanged
  - `LPT.totalSupply()` unchanged
  - `SQD.balanceOf(registry)` unchanged
  - `USDT.balanceOf(pool)` unchanged
- `getRewardStatus()` changed only because it is time-dependent and was sampled at a later block; this is not a storage drift
